SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF FEB-22-2018 IS OFF CALENDAR - PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST. PLAINTIFF ADRIANA LEON ON BEHALF OF ARACELI LEON IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT SHAWN SIMONE SMITH IS PRESENT. TIME FOR THE HEARING EXPIRED WITH NO RESOLUTION. JUDGE CECILIA P. CASTELLANOS INDICATED THE MATTER WOULD BE CONTINUED TO COMPLETE THE HEARING, BUT THE PLAINTIFF DID NOT WANT TO CONTINUE THE MATTER AND INDICATED IF THEY WISH TO HAVE ANOTHER EXAMINATION PLAINTIFF WILL FILE FOR ONE AND CHOOSES TO PROCEED COLLECTION OF JUDGMENT THROUGH OTHER MEANS. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CECILIA P. CASTELLANOS; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. 506
